wiki.keyPeople: John Francis Dodge, Horace Elgin Dodge
wiki.extract: Dodge is an American brand of automobiles and a division of Stellantis, based in Auburn Hills, Michigan. Dodge vehicles have historically included performance cars, and for much of its existence, Dodge was Chrysler's mid-priced brand above Plymouth.

topHazards.label: The goggles contain glass lenses, posing a laceration hazard if shattered.

sampleRecalls.title: Exploding Kittens Recalls Safety Goggles Sold with Extreme Edition Dodgeball Game Sets Due to Laceration Hazard; Sold Exclusively on Kickstarter (Recall Alert)
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves safety goggles sold with the prototype Throw Throw Burrito Extreme Going Pro Edition Dodgeball Card Outdoor Game sets. The goggles were sold with the game sets in a neon orange nylon drawstring backpack with the name of the game in black lettering.
hazards: The goggles contain glass lenses, posing a laceration hazard if shattered.
injuries: The firm has received two reports of goggle lenses breaking or cracking. No injuries have been reported.
products: Safety Goggles sold with Throw Throw Burrito Extreme Going Pro Edition Dodgeball Card Game sets

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was getting out of her vehicle outside the building when she tripped over the doormat and fell to the ground, fracturing her right shoulder.

sampleRecords.part_of_body: Abdomen, except internal location of diseases or disorders
sampleRecords.nature: Internal injuries to organs and blood vessels of the trunk
sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by dislodged flying object, particle
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was strapping a load to the deck of an open trailer when the ratchet mechanism on a turnbuckle failed and the 3-foot-long load bar struck his abdomen. The employee sustained a contusion and internal injury to his abdomen.

sampleRecords.event_description: Compressed or pinched by shifting objects or equipment
sampleRecords.final_narrative: A crew was loading material into the bed of a boom truck with a tag line on one end. An employee was steadying a bundle of I-beams as they were being hoisted onto a boom truck. The load shifted and pinched his right middle finger, resulting in an amputation.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee slipped and fell while walking down stairs, hitting the ground and suffering a head injury.

sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by forward-moving vehicle in nonroadway area
sampleRecords.final_narrative: While being moved, a modified handicap vehicle with the pedals reversed, drove forward and an employee was pinned between the van and a workbench. The employee suffered crushing injuries.
